name: OmbRouter
description: Smart LLM router — 41+ models, x402 micropayments, 92% cost savings

upstreamMode.description: Upstream: x402+BlockRun wallet (default), apiKey (OpenAI-compatible), or moonpay (MoonPay CLI `mp x402 request`).

upstreamApiBase.description: apiKey: OpenAI-compatible base URL. moonpay: optional HTTPS x402 API base (default https://blockrun.ai/api).

moonpayWallet.description: When upstreamMode is moonpay: local wallet name from `mp wallet list`.

moonpayPaymentChain.description: When upstreamMode is moonpay: chain used to pay x402 (default base).

moonpayCliPath.description: When upstreamMode is moonpay: path to `mp` binary (default: mp on PATH).

upstreamApiKey.description: When upstreamMode is apiKey: Bearer API key (sensitive).

upstreamApiKeyAllowAuxRoutes.description: When upstreamMode is apiKey: forward /v1/images/*, /v1/audio/generations, and partner paths to upstreamApiBase with Bearer (default false; or set env OMBROUTER_APIKEY_AUX_ROUTES).

walletKey.description: EVM wallet private key (0x...). Required for x402 mode if no saved wallet. Optional — auto-generated if not set.

maxCostPerRun.description: Max estimated USD spend per session run (optional)

maxTokensPerSession.description: Hard cap on total input+output tokens per session (optional)

quotaIncludeFreeInUsdCap.description: When true, maxCostPerRunUsd also counts free-tier model usage.

costConfigPath.description: Optional path to cost_config.json — per-model input/output/flat price overrides. Default: OMBROUTER_COST_CONFIG env, else ~/.openclaw/blockrun/cost_config.json
